programmes.show_description: This Is CBeebies. Programmes start at 6.00am.
The Oasis. After racing to the playground on a hot day, Tish and her friends are disappointed to find it closed for construction.
Jingly Shoes. Children's animation. Bing finds his old baby shoes. They are much too small for Bing now, but when they fit baby Charlie he has a hard time letting them go.
Stuck. Preschool series. All the Teletubbies are stuck. Tinky Winky's hand is stuck in his bag, Dipsy's hat is stuck, Laa-Laa's ball is stuck and Po is stuck on the Tubby Slidey.
Mo's Birthday. It's Mo's birthday and Tee is determined to fill every minute of the day with fun and games. Is there any chance of Mo sitting down and catching her breath?
Trouble Bubbles. Supertato and Evil Pea get stuck inside a giant floating bubble together.
Magnets. Coco shows Bing how magnets work, but then Bing drops the magnet behind the flowerbed!
Who Duggit? A mystery is afoot! Somebody's been digging up and running off with Jackson's giant vegetables. Detectives Mojo and Bo must follow the clues to the cagey culprit.
Cool, Man. At Squirrel Club, Detective Puppy solves the mystery of a missing biscuit, the Rabbits tell us what's cool, and the Squirrels help Delivery Chipmunk with a huge parcel.
The Being Quiet Badge. Duggee and the Squirrels go on an adventure to find a famously shy creature called The Snard who doesn't like noise...time to earn their Being Quiet badges!
Puppets. Bluey and Bingo teach Unicorse good manners, so he can ask Mum out on a date.
Ice Cream. Bluey and Bingo try to taste each other's each ice creams, but they're starting to melt.
The Salmon Run, Alaska. Glitch sets up an ill-fated 'fishy taxi service' to help the salmon run in Alaska.
The Tale of the Lost Journal. Animated series. When Benjamin accidentally loses Peter's dad's journal, it falls into the clutches of Mr Tod.
Arctic Blizzard. When a blizzard hits, Captain Barnacles will need to use all his Arctic survival tactics.
All the Numbers I Can Be. One is in awe of how many numbers One Hundred has inside - but exactly how many are there? One Hundred takes her on a journey to find out.
Taps. The adventures of 26 lively letters who can make words come to life by holding hands. S is feeling a bit sad but T, A and P are there to help and soon everyone is tap-dancing.
Dancing Away Day. Tiniest Fluffiest Bunny has a dance competition out of town. Love Monster misses her while she is gone and worries that he didn't wish her good luck.
Pockets. Bella and Lift visit Patch in the Cloud Kitchen. He has found a tiny mouse in his pocket, which reminds him of a tasty treat recipe to make with the Playtimers - pocket mouse pitta!
Chilli Pepper. Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the bagpipe-playing Chilli Peppers, melting Kiwi backstage and performing their song We're Chilli When It's Hot!.
Vaccination. Bing is brave for his vaccination as he is looking forward to the Hoppity Voosh sticker Dr Molly will give him afterwards. But then he finds out that there are none left!
Shark. Dee encourages a friend to say 'shark', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. There's a pointy nose shark, a toothy grin shark, and a speedy shark.
What If I Can't. Barnaby regrets not showing the class his backwards roly-poly.
The Together Team. Wilf wants to help the Piggies, but he can't stop falling asleep.
More About Connecting. Stop-motion preschool programme. The Twirlywoos watch a farmer connect fence panels together to make a pen for his sheep, then build a pen of their own.
Star Chart. Justin meets two Irish dancing stars, while Mr Tumble earns stars for his star chart.
Photos. Preschool series. The Teletubbies take selfies with the Tubby Phone and a child in Tummy Tales has their photo taken in a photo booth with their grandparent.
Hairbrush. Giovanna and Baby Bear invite babies and their grown-ups to explore hairbrushes through discovery, play, song and story.
Birthday Party. Elsee plays I-spy during a birthday party with her friends Ethan and Oscar.
Weeds. Aaron, Joda and Isla are on a new garden adventure, this time looking for plants called weeds, which grow in the most surprising of places.
Recycling Day. Recycling day in the attic inspires several great makes. A pot becomes a hairdo, cheese boxes become octopuses, and buttons become a brilliant box robot.
King of the Glowy Things. Wasabi eats a rare glownut and attracts all the glowing creatures, who crown him king!
The Weekend. At the weekend, Bluey and Bingo are playing in the garden with Dad. Bingo gets upset when she discovers a walking leaf insect, but Dad is too caught up in the game to notice.
The Game Show Badge. The Squirrels have played all of their board games, so Duggee entertains them by putting on a game show, with some help hosting from his good friend Ladybug.

programmes.show_name: Hey Duggee: Top of the Pups
programmes.show_description: Wheels on the Bus. The Squirrels go on a bus ride with Duggee as they sing 'Wheels on the Bus'.
Ten-Mile Snake and Willow Tree Walk. Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers stomp like giants and find a ten-mile-long snake on a walk to play a train game!
Eden and Ava's Playtime. Eden and Ava build a den and pretend they're camping. But what was that noise? Roar!
Holly's Merseyside Scouse and Crusty Bread. Holly prepares a special recipe from Liverpool, scouse with crusty bread.

programmes.show_name: Teeny Tiny Creatures with Chantelle and Rory
programmes.show_description: Bats. Chantelle is a bat detective, while Rory and Sandy are out looking for bat clues.
Mission: Bus Ride. Disability assistance dog Tinks needs all her super fetch skills and big dog energy as she helps Charli catch a bus to meet her friend Lydia, who is getting married.
One-Horned Rhino and Babirusa. Aneeshwar and Lizzie meet the one-horned rhino and some babirusas.
Waffle the Pupil. On Waffle's first day as a trial school pupil, he struggles to hold a pen. Waffle decides to hide Miss Berrington's pen pot. If he can't write, why should anyone else?
Baba's Adventure. Baba makes his own way home from the beach - with just a little help from his friends.
Conga. Animated series about a group of singing potatoes. The Small Potatoes conga their way through a fantastical world filled with fruit.
Stick in the Mud. It's been raining, and Toad is resisting the urge to join in with Yukee and her friends' game of musical mud-squelching.
The Fashion Badge. Animated preschool series. Duggee's uniform is getting old and worn out. It's time he made himself a new outfit.
Ball. Preschool series about words. Dee encourages a friend to say 'ball', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure, looking at many different kinds of balls.
Seventy-two's Super Surprise. When Octoblock gets captured by Octonaughty, it's up to superhero Seventy-two to help rescue Octoblock and save the day.
Crash! Educational fun. T's tip-top trick is a tremendously tall tower of teacups - as long as he can avoid any assistance from accident-prone A.
Vets. Educational series using Makaton sign language. Today, Justin takes his friend's pet dog to see a vet. Meanwhile, Mr Tumble pretends to be a vet for his toy patients.
Taking Turns. Preschool comedy and education. Laa-Laa and Po take turns to ride Po's scooter, and then they take turns to play with the Tiddlytubbies.
Patchwork Snail. Patchwork Snail has a problem: she wants to go for a walk with Mouse, but she's far too slow! Will the Patchwork Pals find a way to speed this journey up?
Raa Raa and the Jungle Journey. Animation set in the Jingly Jangly Jungle. Raa Raa and his friends go on a journey, driving their vehicles all over the Jingly Jangly Jungle.
Tai Tracks. New to Chuggington, Tai must navigate her way around town to make an important delivery.
Episode 15. Comedy sketch show for younger viewers. Antiques expert Ann Teak gets more than she bargained for when she examines a Georgian dress.
Epidexipteryx and Tail Feather. Preschool adventure series. Andy heads 160 million years into the past in search of a feather belonging to a tiny dinosaur called the epidexipteryx.
Beware of the Chomper! On the Undergrowth Planet, the Game Catchers learn to play rowing on the river.
Mudskippers. Animated deep sea adventures with Captain Barnacles and his explorers. The Octonauts attempt to keep the peace amongst a trio of mudskippers.
The Tale of the Hero Rabbit. Animated series. Benjamin gets more than he bargained for when a band of desperate mice mistake him for a hero.
The Glasses Badge. Animated preschool series. Mole feels sad that he couldn't pursue his childhood dream of being a stunt mole because his vision is so fuzzy. Can Duggee help?
Vida's New Helpers. When Popcorn gets sick, Fergie and Kipp offer to help Vida out in the clinic. But their competitive natures get in the way of them working together.
Pirate Ship Pursuit. Supertato and Captain Pak Choi team up to get her pirate ship back from Evil Pea.
Mission Bowling. Weasy keeps losing at coconut shy, so he uses a time-stopping machine to cheat.
X Marks the Swop. The treasure of the Knights of Swoppiton awaits! If only Mojo and Bo could find it.
Puppets. Bluey and Bingo teach Unicorse good manners, so he can ask Mum out on a date.
The Piri Rule Book. Flutter is sent to the 'naughty berg' when he falls foul of an ancient Piri rule.
Typewriter. Bluey, Snickers and Winton are ambushed by the Terriers on the way to see Calypso.
Andy and the Alamosaurus. Andy and Jen have an epic adventure on Dino Island with the mighty Alamosaurus.
Waffle and Pepper. Vet Jess and Waffle visit the kennels to check on Waffle's new friend Pepper, who is sad. Waffle helps to find out the reason why - snuggly toy PegStar is broken.
The Dinosaur Wish. Rafi wishes she could see a real dinosaur. Slurpy appears, causing chaos in the museum.
It's Time to Braid Hair. At Charlene's hair salon, JoJo sees a picture of a girl with hair braids - can Gran Gran braid her hair? It's time for a Gran Gran plan with some help from Charlene.
Mountain Mints. Animation for preschool children. Scarf Lady's poetry records inspire a snowy train ride to the mountains.
Busy Buzzers. Stop-motion animation. Small and Major Clanger discover a bowl of glow honey. They take it inside to eat but find some very agitated glowbuzzers.
Catch. A frustrated BaBa wants to catch a ball, so MeMo tries to teach BaBa. With eyes open and concentrating hard, BaBa eventually catches some seeds knocked over at Yummy Time.
Tombliboos Clean Their Teeth. Series for young children. The Tombliboos run around their bush looking for their toothbrushes. They clean their teeth to the teeth-cleaning song.
Lora Fachie - The Black Book of Colours. Lora Fachie's braille read story inspires us to experience the world in a whole new way.
This Is CBeebies. Programmes start at 6.00am.
Dino-Kite. After Tish's kite gets stuck high up in a tree, Tash suggests they go and find a dinosaur to help them get it back.
Looking after Flop. Children's animation. Flop is feeling poorly, so Bing decides to look after him. He makes Flop comfy on the sofa and reads an exciting Hoppity Voosh story.
What's Your Name? Preschool series. The Teletubbies enjoy a game of What's Your Name? Later, there's a surprise when a bowl of Tubby Custard joins in with the game.
Hero Time. When Tee doesn't want to help tidy the house, Mo becomes the superhero 'Monkey Mum' to make the jobs fun.
Not So Supertato. Evil Pea tricks Supertato into thinking that he's lost all of his superpowers.
Shop. While looking for items to sell, Bing and Sula find Mr Rainybow without his head!
Mojo Mail. What top would be best for delivering parcels around town? Mojo and Bo need to decide fast and get those parcels delivered, whether it's by land, water, or high in the air!
Hey Quacky! Worm and Ladybird wonder what's going on at Squirrel Club. There's a gorilla playing drums, some helpful ducks, a hot frog, four goats and a hospital run by chicken doctors.
The Election Badge. When Eugene unexpectedly drops out of running the summer fair, Duggee and the Squirrels hold an election to choose the best candidate for the job.
Turtle Boy. Bingo finds a toy turtle at the playground and wants to take him home.
Dunny. Mum bans the girls from saying 'dunny', so they try and trick her into saying it instead.
Tomatina Festival, Bunol, Spain. Can the Go Jetters fix their own 'glitch' at the biggest food fight in the world?
The Tale of the Missing Ducklings. Animated series. A simple matter of duckling-sitting turns into a potential disaster when the ducklings escape into the wood.
Gobi Desert. A replanting mission is interrupted when a gazelle goes missing just as a sandstorm hits.
The Rings of Unity. The Numberblocks Space Division are investigating a signal - until a strange planet splits them into hundreds, tens and ones. How can they escape?
In. The adventures of 26 lively letters who can make words come to life by holding hands. I holds hands with N and they find themselves stuck inside a floating balloon.
Picnic Night. A mysterious giant bunny delays the night-time picnic.
Ball. Bella and Lift have fun playing with their favourite red bouncy ball. It drops into the Ice Disco, giving Hettie the Yeti an idea for a bouncy dance!
Cauliflower. Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Cauliflower creaking away as she grows and sings her catchy Cauliflower Creak song.
Leaf Pictures. Bing and his friends are making leaf pictures, but the wind whisks Coco's picture off the table! Bing catches it by stamping on her picture, and now Coco is angry.
Lemon. Dee encourages a friend to say 'lemon', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see a yellow lemon, a juicy lemon, a growing lemon, and Dee meets a loud lemon!
Home Toy. Lu gets upset when she loses Declan's special toy.
Board Game. The Piggies can't decide between playing outside or staying inside with a board game. Charlie builds a giant outdoor board game, but everyone's competitiveness ruins the fun.
More About Soft. Stop-motion preschool programme. Toodloo runs off with a soft, fluffy hat. A lady walking her dog strokes the hat, while a bald man enjoys wearing it.
Day Trip. Justin and his friend ride on a canal boat, and Mr Tumble takes the Tumble Car for a spin.
Knock Knock. Preschool series. Tinky Winky knocks on a door and is welcomed by Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po. The children in Tummy Tales knock on their neighbours' doors.
Bath Toy. Nigel and Baby Bear invite babies and their grown-ups to explore bath toys through discovery, play, song and story.
Market Stall. Elsee visits a market stall with her friend Annabelle to play a game of I-spy.
Seeds. Aaron, James and Abbie find some baby plants in the garden. They go on an adventure to discover where they come from and how to grow your own.
Too Hot! A paper plate crab is the first make of the day, and an old wooden spoon becomes a spoon monster. The Recycling Express provides yogurt pots to make a palm tree.
Prickly Problem. Ginger and the Peas get trapped in an underwater cave with a pack of inflated Lycheemodus!
BBQ. It's lunchtime on Bluey's back deck!
The Round Up Badge. The Squirrels go on the trail of a lost herd of cattle with Duggee and his old pal Rodeo Horse, who teaches them how to be cowhands and earn their Round Up Badges!

programmes.show_name: Hey Duggee: Top of the Pups
programmes.show_description: Potty Song. A song about teaching Duggly how to use the potty.
Square Spiders and Raindrops Walk. Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers listen to raindrops and meet a square spider on a walk to the florist.
Eden and Ava - Roller Skaters! Eden and Ava go rollerskating, but will Ava be able to keep up with her big sister?
Leo's Russian Sharlotka. Leo is baking a sharlotka, a traditional Russian apple cake.

programmes.show_name: Teeny Tiny Creatures with Chantelle and Rory
programmes.show_description: Dragonflies. Chantelle is fossil-hunting, while Rory and Sandy are looking for dragonflies.
Mission: Astronomy Adventure. When a group of astronomers get lost on Woofton Hill at night, Dan and Jamie get their kit together for a night-time search. Pup-pup-POW!
Striated Caracara and Wolverine. Aneeshwar and Lizzie meet two amazing animals and reveal a surprising connection between them in the wild. This time, it's striated caracara and wolverines.
Waffle and Benji. Waffle's been awarded the class toy for good behaviour, and Zoe and Callum have big news.
The Burrow Race. Oona and May have a race to decide which of them is fastest. There's an unexpected winner.
I Love to Dance the Flamenco. Animated series about a group of singing potatoes. The Small Potatoes visit Spain for a flamenco dancing fiesta.
Worm Chorus. Yukee is desperate to meet the worms that live in the soil beneath the garden. Learning that they only come out when it rains, Yukee tries to simulate the sound.
The Being Quiet Badge. Duggee and the Squirrels go on an adventure to find a famously shy creature called The Snard who doesn't like noise...time to earn their Being Quiet badges!
Mouse. Preschool series about words. Dee encourages a friend to say 'mouse', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure, meeting lots of different mice.
The Magical Nines. Ninety puts on a magic show using two giant hands to help the Numberblobs find all the Magical Nines that make up the Nine Times Table.
Four. Educational fun. When N tries to ban D from the band, the others get the fab four back together to prove that you can do much more with four!
Imaginary Journey. Educational series using Makaton sign language. All aboard for a steam train adventure with Justin and his friends, while Mr Tumble zooms off into space!
Horses. Preschool comedy and education. Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-Laa gallop across Teletubbyland pretending to be horses. Children in Tummy Tales help to groom and feed a horse.
Patchwork Crocodile. Patchwork Crocodile has a problem: he wants to play gobble up, but nobody likes that game! Really nobody?
Raa Raa and Poorly Pia. Animation set in the Jingly Jangly Jungle. Pia has hurt her wing and can't fly around or play, so Raa Raa tries to find a way to cheer her up.
Brewster's Greatest Gift. With Hodge's radiator broken and no way to order another one, Brewster turns out to be the only one that can help by making a brave decision.
Episode 16. Comedy sketch show for younger viewers. Reporting from some roadworks, Gail Force struggles to make herself heard over a very noisy drill.
Nothrotheriops and Dung. Preschool adventure series. Andy travels 15,000 years into the past to meet a giant prehistoric sloth.
A Surprise Planet. The Game Catchers land on Surprise Planet to play the mystery object.
Harbour Seal. Animated deep sea adventures with Captain Barnacles and his explorers. When Peso's patient mysteriously disappears, the Octonauts enlist a unique undersea detective.
The Tale of the Falling Rock. Animated series. Peter and his friends realise that a hibernating Mrs Tiggy-Winkle is in the path of a landslide!
The Duck Badge. The clubhouse is inundated with stray ducklings who think Norrie is their mum.
Sweetwood's Itchy Scratchies. When animal after animal show up at Vida's clinic with a mysterious rash, she's determined to find the cause. It's poison ivy!
The Prickly Pear Kid. Evil Pea sends a load of Mini Peas to infiltrate Tato Tower. There's only one person who can help him - the expert pea-yodeller, Prickly Pear.
Mission Taking Turns. Weasy won't return a video game to the ducklings until he wins.
Cliffhanger. Felix the pig is stuck on a cliff ledge where not even Mojo's tops can reach him. They will need to be creative to get Bo up there and save that poor pig!
Turtle Boy. Bingo finds a toy turtle at the playground and wants to take him home.
The Jukebox Jam. When a jukebox washes up, its catchy song takes over the berg - to Pancake's annoyance.
Baby Race. Mum remembers when Bluey and Judo were babies and their race to see who would walk first!
Andy and the Runaway Ankylosaurus. Andy and Jen embark on an epic adventure across Dino Island with a runaway Ankylosaurus.
Helpful Waffle. Waffle tries to help his friend Pepper find a new owner.
The Driving Wish. Rafi learns that changing plans can lead to the best adventures.
It's Time for a Dance Class. JoJo is super excited to go dancing and to help her friend Henry at his first dance class.
Bench Blocked. Animation for preschool children. When Sarah and Duck's favourite bench is in use, the pair find other things to do in the park.
Calm in the Caves. Stop-motion animation. Tiny and Small discover the froglets sitting abnormally silent and calm in their cave, in front of three glowing stones.
Wait. BaBa is eager to start a race and forgets to wait for Gramma Leeba to say go. MeMo helps BaBa understand that sometimes you have to wait before rushing in.
Igglepiggle's Blanket Walks About by Itself. Igglepiggle leaves his blanket while he dances, but then he can't find it. Then he sees his blanket running about by itself.
Guz Khan - My Most Exciting Eid. Join Guz Khan for a special story celebrating Eid al-Fitr.
